# GSEA module

#### Performs GSEA analysis using the fgsea package. See [<span style="color:blue">package</span>](https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/fgsea.html) and [<span style="color:blue">tutorial</span>](https://bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/vignettes/fgsea/inst/doc/fgsea-tutorial.html) for more details.

<span style="color:red">**This module currently supports human and mouse genomes as well as gene sets provided by MSigDB.**</span> To use additional species or custom gene set files, use the GSEA Explorer App instead.



##### **Module Input:**

A tab-delimited file containing at least two columns:
* Column that represents the feature (eg. gene name)
* Column that contains a quantification of that feature (eg. log2FoldChange)
* Additional columns are allowed
* Feature column and quantification column names must be set with the "Run GSEA" settings. 

##### **Module Results:**

* Results table
![Image](data:image/png;base64,)
* Enrichment plot for each significant gene set
![Image](data:image/png;base64,)
